title: ClusterPack
description: Management cluster record of an immutable compiled OCI artifact for a specific pack version. Produced by compiler packbuild. Never created at runtime. Scope: Namespaced -- seam-system. wrapper-schema.md §4.

spec.description: ClusterPack specification. Immutable after creation except for status fields.

version.description: Declared version string. Immutable after creation.

registryRef.description: OCI registry reference for the full artifact.

url.description: OCI registry URL for the artifact.

digest.description: OCI content digest (sha256) of the full artifact.

checksum.description: Content-addressed checksum of the full artifact manifest set.

rbacDigest.description: OCI digest of the RBAC layer of this ClusterPack artifact. Contains ServiceAccount, Role, ClusterRole, RoleBinding, ClusterRoleBinding manifests extracted at compile time. Guardian /rbac-intake processes this layer before workload apply proceeds. Absent on pre-split ClusterPack specs for backward compatibility.

workloadDigest.description: OCI digest of the workload layer of this ClusterPack artifact. Contains all non-RBAC manifests. Applied after guardian RBACProfile for this pack reaches provisioned=true. Absent on pre-split ClusterPack specs for backward compatibility.

sourceBuildRef.description: Optional reference to the PackBuild spec file path in git. Provenance only -- not a cluster object reference.

executionOrder.description: Stage ordering derived from the compiled execution graph. Stages in order: rbac, storage, stateful, stateless.

provenance.description: Build identity, timestamp, Helm chart digest, compiler version, compilation timestamp.

targetClusters.description: List of cluster names to which this ClusterPack should be delivered.

status.description: ClusterPack runtime status. Written exclusively by the ClusterPackReconciler and conductor signing loop.

signed.description: True after the conductor signing loop has verified and annotated the artifact.

packSignature.description: Base64-encoded platform signature written by the signing loop.
